languages.text: "Я хотела бы отметить, что разделяю их чувства. Спасибо за вашу заботу об обслуживании аугментов старшего офицерства и лично моей семьи. Машины заменяют нашу плоть во имя службы династии, и ваше внимание для нас — высшая ценность".

traits.locale_text: "Я хотела бы отметить, что разделяю их чувства. Спасибо за вашу заботу об обслуживании аугментов старшего офицерства и лично моей семьи. Машины заменяют нашу плоть во имя службы Династии и ваше внимание для нас — высшая ценность". {n}Вигдис выжидает правильный момент и ловко кланяется в такт песнопению.{/n}

languages.text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."
languages.original_text: "Я хотела бы отметить, что разделяю их чувства. Спасибо за вашу заботу об обслуживании аугментов старшего офицерства и лично моей семьи. Машины заменяют нашу плоть во имя службы династии, и ваше внимание для нас — высшая ценность".

traits.locale_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

"I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

"I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

languages.text: 「私も彼らの気持ちに賛同いたします。長官や私の家族のために、増援の維持に尽力していただき、ありがとうございます。王朝のために我々は肉体を機械に置き換えますが、あなたたちの配慮は計り知れません」
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

languages.text: "Ben de onların duygularını paylaştığımı belirtmek isterim. Kıdemli subaylar ve şahsen ailem adına ogment bakımına gösterdiğiniz özenli ilgi için teşekkür ederim. Makineler, hanedanlığa hizmetimiz adına etimizin yerini alıyor. Bize gösterdiğiniz itibar paha biçilemez."
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de onların duygularını paylaştığımı belirtmek isterim. Kıdemli subaylar ve şahsen ailem adına ogment bakımına gösterdiğiniz özenli ilgi için teşekkür ederim. Makineler, hanedanlığa hizmetimiz adına etimizin yerini alıyor. Bize gösterdiğiniz itibar paha biçilemez."

languages.text: “容我补充，我与他们有同样的感激之情。感谢您对高阶军官及我家族成员植入物的悉心维护。机械取代我们的血肉是为了让我们侍奉王朝，而您对我们的关怀是无价之宝。”
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

traits.locale_text: “容我补充，我与他们有同样的感激之情。感谢您对高阶军官及我家族成员植入物的悉心维护。机械取代我们的血肉是为了让我们侍奉王朝，而您对我们的关怀是无价之宝。”

languages.text: "Ich möchte anmerken, dass ich ihre Bedenken teile. Danke, dass Ihr die Wartung der Augmentationen der leitenden Offiziere und meiner Familie so akribisch überwacht. Maschinen ersetzen unser Fleisch im Namen unseres Dienstes für die Dynastie und Eure Sorge um uns ist von unschätzbarem Wert."
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte anmerken, dass ich ihre Bedenken teile. Danke, dass Ihr die Wartung der Augmentationen der leitenden Offiziere und meiner Familie so akribisch überwacht. Maschinen ersetzen unser Fleisch im Namen unseres Dienstes für die Dynastie und Eure Sorge um uns ist von unschätzbarem Wert."

languages.text: « Je tiens à ajouter que je partage leur sentiment. Merci de veiller scrupuleusement à la maintenance des augmentations des officiers supérieurs en général et de ma famille en particulier. C'est pour mieux servir la dynastie que nos tissus organiques sont remplacés par des machines, et la considération que vous nous témoignez est notre plus belle récompense. »
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

traits.locale_text: « Je tiens à ajouter que je partage leur sentiment. Merci de veiller scrupuleusement à la maintenance des augmentations des officiers supérieurs en général et de ma famille en particulier. C'est pour mieux servir la dynastie que nos tissus organiques sont remplacés par des machines, et la considération que vous nous témoignez est notre plus belle récompense. »

languages.text: «Quisiera añadir que comparto sus sentimientos. Gracias por la diligente atención prestada al mantenimiento de aumentos de los oficiales de mayor grado y, especialmente, de mis familiares. Las máquinas sustituyen nuestra carne al servicio de la dinastía, y el aprecio que nos demuestra es de un valor incomparable».
languages.original_text: "I would like to note that I share their sentiments. Thank you for your diligent attention to augment maintenance for the senior officers and my family personally. Machines replace our flesh in the name of our service to the dynasty, and your regard for us is of incomparable value."

Las máquinas sustituyen nuestra carne al servicio de la dinastía, y el aprecio que nos demuestra es de un valor incomparable».
